caption: The image showcases a men's formal wear outfit consisting of a cream-colored kurta and white shalwar. The kurta features a band collar and full sleeves, made from a plain, slightly textured fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend suitable for winter clothing. The shalwar is a slim-fit style, complementing the kurta's simple design. The model is posing in a three-quarter shot, standing in front of a backdrop with architectural drawings, and accessorized with a watch and brown loafers.

This is a men's formal wear kurta in a grey color with a subtle textured pattern, likely suitable for winter clothing. The kurta features a band collar with a placket that extends partway down the chest, fastened with four buttons. The model is posing in front of a plain white background.

This is a men's formal wear outfit consisting of an off-white shalwar kameez paired with a dark grey waistcoat, suitable for winter. The waistcoat features a mandarin collar, a five-button closure, and two welt pockets, while the shalwar kameez is plain and has a relaxed fit. The model is posing in a full shot against a plain light background, wearing black loafers.
A man wearing a black wool waistcoat with gold buttons over a white kurta. He is standing in a formal pose.
A man wearing a dark grey waistcoat with a textured fabric and button closure, paired with a white kurta pajama. The man is standing in a neutral setting.
